_comment: MCP servers Claude Code loads at startup. Tokens are read from .env via ${VAR} expansion. Copy .env.example to .env and fill in real values. Do NOT commit .env.

figma._comment: Read-only Figma access for the Designer Agent. Get a personal access token at https://www.figma.com/developers/api#access-tokens

github._comment: GitHub MCP for the DevOps Agent. Create a fine-scoped Personal Access Token at https://github.com/settings/tokens with 'repo' + 'workflow' scopes.

vercel._comment: Vercel remote MCP for the DevOps Agent. Replace <team-slug>/<project-slug> in the URL with your actual values. Create a Vercel access token at https://vercel.com/account/tokens

supabase._comment: Supabase MCP — used by Architect (schema design) and DEV (migrations) when project uses Supabase. Optional; leave SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN blank to disable. Get a personal access token at https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens
